description: French-made sport quickdraw with hot-forged keylock carabiners. Clean design from the same company known for premium ropes.
Sport climbing quickdraw with Star Gate keylock solid gate on bolt end and Cosmo Wire wiregate on rope end. 16mm tubular sling with RUBBINER retainer.
Hot-forged keylock quickdraw with snag-free nose on both carabiners. A reliable sport climbing workhorse at an excellent price point.
Hybrid quickdraw combining a hot-forged keylock bolt-end carabiner with a lighter wiregate rope-end carabiner. Best value sport draw on the market.
Dual wiregate quickdraw with hot-forged carabiners. Lighter than the HotForge with wide gate openings for easy clipping.
Budget-friendly wiregate quickdraw. Light and simple — a solid first quickdraw set for gym-to-outdoor transition.
Ultralight trad quickdraw weighing only 53g. Minimalist MiniWire carabiners are among the lightest full-size biners available.
Alpine quickdraw with 60cm Dynex sling for extending placements. Uses ultralight MiniWire carabiners to minimize rack weight.
Ultra-lightweight quickdraw with patent-pending stainless steel wire hood bringing keylock functionality to wiregate carabiners. Dual wiregate with Dynex sling.
Entry-level keylock quickdraw. Dual solid gates provide smooth clipping and easy cleaning at a budget-friendly price.
Premium quickdraw with Camp's innovative KeyWire two-part gate combining smooth wire action with keylock closure. Exceptional 11kN open-gate strength.
Minimalist alpine quickdraw with Nano 22 micro carabiners. Extended 22cm sling helps reduce rope drag on wandering routes.
Versatile wiregate quickdraw with keylock on both biners. Wide gate opening and affordable price make it a great all-rounder.
Hybrid quickdraw with solid-gate Photon on top and wire-gate Photon on the rope end. Combines durability with light weight.
Lightweight quickdraw with keylock wire Photon carabiners on a Dyneema sling. Excellent gate opening at 26mm despite low weight.
Ultra-lightweight alpine quickdraw with hot-forged Fly-Weight Evo carabiners on Dyneema sling. Compact T-beam construction.
Extended version of the Fly-Weight Evo quickdraw for route building and longer extensions.
Ultra-lightweight quickdraw with hot-forged Fly-Weight Evo carabiners and Dyneema sling. One of the lightest full quickdraws at 56g.
Italian-made sport quickdraw with dual keylock solid gates. Hot-forged carabiners at an entry-level price — exceptional value.
Ergonomic high-performance quickdraw with hot-forged carabiners and tapered slings. One of the lightest in its category.
Sport quickdraw with Salto carabiners (straight + curved gate) and nylon webbing with webbing stopper.
Lightweight version of the Salto Set with UHMWPE sling for reduced weight.
Stick-clip quickdraw system with Nimble Tricky carabiner on a semi-rigid 35cm polyamide sling for clipping out-of-reach protection.
Budget-friendly alpine/trad quickdraw. Wiregate carabiners on Dyneema sling keep weight low for rack-heavy days.
Ultralight I-Beam wiregate quickdraw on 11mm Dynatec Dyneema sling. Clean nose design prevents snagging. DMM's lightest quickdraw at 69g.
Premium sport quickdraw made in Wales. I-beam construction with grippy back bars and deep rope baskets for confident clipping on hard routes.
Ultra-lightweight trad/alpine draw. I-beam Phantom carabiners weigh just 28g each with reduced gate notch to prevent snagging.
Pure sport quickdraw with dual keylock solid gates. Grooved gates provide extra grip for controlled clipping on steep routes.
Hybrid quickdraw combining a Shadow solid gate on the bolt end with a lighter Spectre wiregate on the rope end. Ideal for weight-conscious sport climbing.
Versatile trad quickdraw with I-beam wire carabiners. A solid middle-ground between the ultralight Phantom and the sport-oriented Alpha.
DMM's most compact ultralight quickdraw. The 22g Wisp carabiner features a compact frame with 20mm gate opening on an 11mm Dyneema sling.
The most durable quickdraw on the market. Steel insert in the rope-end carabiner prevents rope groove wear, dramatically extending lifespan.
The world's lightest quickdraw at just 46g. Uses the 19.5g Nineteen G carabiner — the lightest full-strength biner on the market.
Solid-gate keylock quickdraw at an entry-level price. The Pure carabiner offers great handling for new climbers at outstanding value.
Lightweight wire-gate version of the Pure Set. Wire gates offer lighter weight and better performance in cold conditions.
Entry-level quickdraw with keylock wire gates. The best budget option for climbers buying their first quickdraw set.
Spanish-made sport quickdraw from the bolt and anchor specialists. Hot-forged keylock carabiners at a very competitive price.
Italian-made sport quickdraw with dual keylock closure. Hot-forged carabiners provide smooth action and durability at a competitive price.
Ultra-lightweight alpine quickdraw with dual wiregate carabiners on Dyneema sling. Designed for weight-conscious alpinists.
Updated version of the Alpine Plume with improved gate mechanism. Dual wiregate on Dyneema sling for alpine and trad climbing.
Italian-made sport quickdraw with hot-forged Rush carabiners. Dual keylock gates and smooth action from a heritage climbing brand.
Exceptionally strong quickdraw with 27kN major axis rating. Wire gates eliminate gate flutter for consistent performance.
Sport quickdraw with color-coded indicator to distinguish bolt-end from rope-end. Dual keylock gates prevent snagging.
Lightweight wiregate quickdraw with keylock closure and color-coded orientation indicator. A solid all-round quickdraw.
Ultralight alpine quickdraw with keylock solid gate on bolt end and Dyneema sling. Ribbed grip zone for easier clipping.
Ultralight dual wiregate quickdraw with Dyneema sling. The lightest Mammut quickdraw at 68g.
Robust sport climbing quickdraw with generous geometry and ribbed grip zone. Polyester sling with sling protector.
Lightweight trad quickdraw with flexible sling. Simple, reliable wiregate carabiners at a reasonable price.
Safety-focused quickdraw with a permanently captured bolt-end carabiner. The captive eye design prevents cross-loading and incorrect clipping.
Czech-made quickdraw with keylock wire gates. Hot-forged Hawk carabiners offer excellent handling at an outstanding price.
Ultra-lightweight quickdraw with Petzl's MonoFil keylock wiregate technology. Ideal when every gram counts on long alpine and multi-pitch routes.
Durable workhorse quickdraw for sport climbing. Large keylock carabiners with generous gate openings make it one of the easiest draws to clip.
The benchmark sport climbing quickdraw. Smooth keylock gates on both carabiners make clipping and cleaning effortless. Wide dogbone provides stability.
Italian-engineered sport quickdraw with hot-forged keylock carabiners. G3 design provides ergonomic clipping at a competitive price.
The most affordable quickdraw on the market from Decathlon's climbing brand. Solid CE-certified performance at an unbeatable price.
Czech-made sport quickdraw with dual keylock solid gates. Hot-forged construction at an impressive price point.
Alpine quickdraw with 60cm Dyneema sling for extending placements. Color-coded biners help distinguish bolt and rope ends.
Lightweight trad quickdraw with hot-forged Astro carabiners featuring a hooded nose to minimize bolt snagging. Wide 24mm gate opening.
Sport quickdraw with hot-forged Helium carabiners. Dual keylock solid gates provide smooth, snag-free clipping and cleaning.
Entry-level wiregate quickdraw. Light, affordable, and effective — ideal for gym climbers transitioning to outdoor sport climbing.
